# ADL Business Consulting, PC

> Bay Area CPA and business consulting firm serving small business owners and individuals in Fremont, California and the surrounding Bay Area.

## About

ADL Business Consulting, PC is a California professional corporation founded by Garrett Loughman, a licensed CPA (California License #150109) with over 15 years of experience in accounting, finance, consulting, finance transformation, and both internal and external audit. Founded in 2026, the firm brings big-firm quality directly to small business owners who deserve it.

## Services

- Entity structure review — determining the optimal business structure (LLC, S-Corp, C-Corp) from a tax efficiency standpoint
- Accounting and bookkeeping — monthly reconciliation, categorization, financial reporting
- Tax return review — business and personal returns, deduction maximization
- Payroll provider implementation — selecting, configuring, and launching payroll systems; California compliance
- Technology implementations — QuickBooks setup, point-of-sale systems, small business tools
- Business process optimization — identifying inefficiencies, reducing operational costs, building scalable workflows
- Personal finance education — budgeting, debt management, retirement planning
- Website and app development — modern responsive websites and web apps
- AI agent implementation — deploying AI-powered automations tailored to business workflows

## Credentials

- Garrett Loughman, CPA — California License #150109, licensed since 2013
- MBA
- 15+ years in accounting, finance, consulting, finance transformation, internal and external audit

## Location

Fremont, California. Serving clients remotely and in person across the Bay Area.

## Blog

Regular articles on tax strategy, accounting best practices, California payroll compliance, QuickBooks, entity structure, and small business finance, written by Garrett Loughman.
